completed_tasks.name: Enable documents navigation + wire DocumentsTab into workspace

remaining_tasks.name: Visual verification of document preview feature
remaining_tasks.progress: Checkpoint reached — user testing revealed two bugs being fixed inline

blockers.description: ResizablePanelGroup handle can only resize smaller, not bigger. react-resizable-panels v4.6.4 Separator component renders and shows cursor change but drag-to-enlarge does not work. Multiple CSS approaches tried (simplified wrapper, wider hit area, removed conflicting flex). Root cause unclear — may be a flex layout conflict between library inline styles and Tailwind.
blockers.workaround: Outline panel still functional at default 25% width, just not user-resizable to larger

decisions.decision: Backend _plan_references_section pattern tightened to require 'Section' prefix for heading matches
decisions.rationale: Prevented section '1' from falsely matching '1.1' in headings like 'Task 1: ...'

decisions.decision: Added _extract_section_content to slice SUMMARY.md per-section instead of returning full file
decisions.rationale: Multi-section SUMMARYs caused content duplication — each child section rendered the entire file

decisions.decision: SectionBlock only renders SectionContent for leaf nodes (no children)
decisions.rationale: Parent sections are structural containers, not content holders
After fixing parent section status to 'empty', top-level check showed false empty state
Python f-string interpreted {1,6} as set literal instead of regex quantifier — needed {{1,6}}

decisions.decision: Set V1_DOCS_PATH to absolute path in backend/.env
decisions.rationale: Default relative path ./gsd-docs-industrial resolved from backend/ CWD, not project root

next_action: Fix the ResizablePanelGroup drag-to-enlarge issue. The Separator component from react-resizable-panels v4.6.4 allows shrinking the outline panel but not enlarging it. Investigate whether the library's inline flex styles conflict with the wrapper's className. Try removing all className from the Group wrapper and testing bare. Then commit all bugfixes, complete plan 11-03 SUMMARY, and run verification.
context_notes: Plans 11-01 and 11-02 completed by executor agents (4 commits each). Plan 11-03 checkpoint paused at task 2 (visual verification). During user testing, found: (1) content duplication — fixed by adding section extraction and leaf-only rendering, (2) resize handle not working — partially debugged, cursor changes but drag only works in one direction. Also seeded project 2 with test data (PLAN/SUMMARY files in backend/projects/2/) and fixed backend .env for V1_DOCS_PATH. Backend servers were started manually during checkpoint.
